headline: JB Hunt Transport Services (JBHT) Surges After-Hours on Strong Earnings Beat
summary: JB Hunt Transport Services beat Q2 2026 earnings estimates with EPS of $1.91 and revenue of $3.50B, surging 5.7% in after-hours trading on strong intermodal and logistics performance.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on JB Hunt Transport Servs, Raises Price Target to $280
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Lucas Servera   maintains JB Hunt Transport Servs (NASDAQ:JBHT) with a Hold and raises the price target from $230 to $280.
